title: Trace the Deployment reconcile loop
scenario: The `api-server` Deployment should have 4 replicas but was incorrectly set to 2. The reconciler detected the drift and is waiting for someone to fix the desired state. Update the Deployment to 4 replicas and watch the controller reconcile: Deployment → ReplicaSet → 4 Pods.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: api-server
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-server
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: myapp/api:v2.1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

hints.text: Only `spec.replicas` needs changing — from 2 to 4. The selector and template are correct.
After applying, watch the Cluster View: the ReplicaSet will create 2 more Pods. They'll transition Pending → Running in a few ticks.

solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: api-server
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-server
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: myapp/api:v2.1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
